creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 237076
Patch file

Update to 1.31.0.

ChangeLog:      https://github.com/certbot/certbot/releases/tag/v1.31.0

* Build of all updated ports succeeds with poudriere and 13.1-RELEASE amd64 jail.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-acme test` is '291 passed, 1 warning'.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-certbot test` is '991 passed, 28 skipped, 491 warnings'.
